Index.student_subtext: Verified profiles. Skill-based discovery. No noise.
Index.company_subtext: Direct access to verified student talent matching your technical stack.

Auth.dont_have_account: Don't have an account? Sign up
Auth.i_am_student_desc: Create a profile and connect with companies.
Auth.i_am_company_desc: Post listings and discover verified talent.
Auth.connect_ms: Connect your UKIM Microsoft account to confirm you are an active student.
Auth.phone_verify_desc: We use phone verification to prevent spam accounts.
Auth.waitlist_msg: You're on the list. Linker is currently available to UKIM students only. We'll notify you when general access opens.
Auth.reset_password_desc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
Auth.reset_email_sent: If an account with that email exists, we've sent a password reset link.

Common.cookie_consent_text: This platform uses session cookies to keep you signed in and remember your preferences.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.section1_text: By accessing and using Linker, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the platform.
Terms.section2_text: Linker is available to students enrolled at UKIM and to registered companies. You must be at least 18 years old to create an account.
Terms.section3_text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to provide accurate and complete information during registration.
Terms.section4_text: You agree not to misuse the platform, including but not limited to: creating fake profiles, scraping data, harassing other users, or posting misleading listings.
Terms.section5_text: All content and branding on Linker is the property of Linker or its licensors. You retain ownership of content you submit but grant Linker a license to display it on the platform.
Terms.section6_text: Linker is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the platform.
Terms.section7_text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.section1_text: We collect information you provide during registration (name, email, university details) and usage data such as pages visited and actions taken.
Privacy.section2_text: Your information is used to provide and improve the platform, match students with companies, verify student status, and communicate important updates.
Privacy.section3_text: We do not sell your personal data. Company users may see anonymized student profiles. Your full profile is only revealed when you give explicit consent through an acknowledgment.
Privacy.section4_text: Your data is stored securely using Supabase infrastructure with encryption at rest and in transit. We implement industry-standard security measures.
Privacy.section5_text: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. Contact us to exercise these rights.
Privacy.section6_text: We use essential session cookies to keep you signed in. No third-party tracking cookies are used.
Privacy.section7_text: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact us through the platform.
